id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0000
text:
![](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/datacenter-1921649117-landscape-4x1.jpg?t=h440)
Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself? [Podcast](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/podcast/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 16/10/2025 • 2 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Without US cloud services and chips from Taiwan, much of our digital life would grind to a halt.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0000
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?
metadata.tags: Podcast, Technologie, Media & Telecom, Digitalisering, AI
metadata.author: Julia Krauwer
metadata.description: How can Europe become more digitally independent? Discover the risks and opportunities of digital sovereignty in this episode of Achter de Cijfers.
metadata.parent_text:
![](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/datacenter-1921649117-landscape-4x1.jpg?t=h440)
Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself? [Podcast](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/podcast/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 16/10/2025 • 2 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Without US cloud services and chips from Taiwan, much of our digital life would grind to a halt. Yet Europe still relies heavily on technology from elsewhere. How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty. For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B.

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0009
text:
Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0009
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?
metadata.tags: Podcast, Technologie, Media & Telecom, Digitalisering, AI
metadata.author: Julia Krauwer
metadata.description: How can Europe become more digitally independent? Discover the risks and opportunities of digital sovereignty in this episode of Achter de Cijfers.
metadata.parent_text:
Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters. Whether it is cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence or chip technology, Europe should invest strategically and work together to build a stronger position. Europe also has the chance to develop technology that fits its own values: transparent, fair and focused on the public interest. Think of AI that does not discriminate, social media that are not purely geared towards addiction, and cloud solutions that safeguard privacy and security.

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0016
text: Europe seems to have woken up: technology is a geopolitical lever, so we need a thriving tech sector of our own. In the article [Europe bets on technological self-reliance](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/europa-zet-in-op-technologische-zelfredzaamheid.html) you can read about the state of play in cloud, artificial intelligence, chips and the broader start-up ecosystem.

metadata.description: How can Europe become more digitally independent? Discover the risks and opportunities of digital sovereignty in this episode of Achter de Cijfers.
metadata.parent_text: Europe seems to have woken up: technology is a geopolitical lever, so we need a thriving tech sector of our own. In the article [Europe bets on technological self-reliance](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/europa-zet-in-op-technologische-zelfredzaamheid.html) you can read about the state of play in cloud, artificial intelligence, chips and the broader start-up ecosystem. Where does Europe stand, and where is it making headway?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__a9-hybrid-small-to-big__0022
text: From unaffordable housing to rising inflation, we explain it clearly and without jargon. Economics is more than numbers and charts; it is about your wallet.

In conversation. On many stages and platforms, our experts and representatives talk with entrepreneurs and others about current topics. They discuss issues such as sustainable business, the circular economy, real estate and social impact. Follow the webinars, podcasts and interviews. [Watch the videos or listen to the podcasts](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/index.html)
Read more in the technology sector. Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector underpins the digital renewal of other sectors. [View all articles](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html)
